---
title: "intro-to-mmspower"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{intro-to-mmspower}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```
## This is a baseline vignette
```{r setup}
library(MMSpower)
```
```{r} 
hello_mmspower()
```
